nameMeanings.name: Schoenfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Erwin, Franz, Klaus, Adelheid, Eugen, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard, Hanns.
German (Schönfeld): habitational name from any of numerous places called Schönfeld, from Middle High German schoen ‘beautiful’ + velt ‘open country, field’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönfeld): artificial name composed of German schön ‘beautiful’ + Feld ‘field’. Compare Schonfeld .

variants.name: Schonfeld
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Yoel, Aron, Elihu, Hyman, Mordechi, Naftula, Sholom, Tovia, Zalman.  German Klaus, Erwin, Gunter, Kurt.

variants.name: Schoenfeldt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Arno, Kurt.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan von Schoenfeld was born in 1400, in Schönfeld, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Jan the Older von Schoenfeld, was 36 and his mother, Else von Limpach, was 42. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz. He died before 1465.

ko.lifeSummary: Jan von Schoenfeld(이)가 1400년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 슈o펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan the Older von Schoenfeld(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Else von Limpach(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 이전 사망했다.
